title: --all-platforms fails with base image using both tag and digest
body:
### Issue Description

Using a `FROM` with both tag and digest works by default but it fails with `Error: base image name "..." didn't resolve to a manifest list` when using `--all-platforms`

See https://gitlab.com/to-be-contained/images/-/jobs/11125506851 https://gitlab.com/to-be-contained/images/-/jobs/11108719730

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue

```Dockerfile
FROM docker.io/library/alpine:3@sha256:4bcff63911fcb4448bd4fdacec207030997caf25e9bea4045fa6c8c44de311d1
```

`buildah build --all-platforms`

### Describe the results you received

`Error: base image name "docker.io/library/alpine:3@sha256:4bcff63911fcb4448bd4fdacec207030997caf25e9bea4045fa6c8c44de311d1" didn't resolve to a manifest list`

### Describe the results you expected

Should works and build for all platforms like:

```Dockerfile
FROM docker.io/library/alpine@sha256:4bcff63911fcb4448bd4fdacec207030997caf25e9bea4045fa6c8c44de311d1
```

### buildah version output

```yaml
Version:         1.40.1
Go Version:      go1.24.3
Image Spec:      1.1.1
Runtime Spec:    1.2.1
CNI Spec:        1.1.0
libcni Version:  
image Version:   5.35.0
Git Commit:      
Built:           Thu Jun  5 14:13:27 2025
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

### buildah info output

GitLab Runner

Using docker image `quay.io/containers/buildah:v1`

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: Waiting for next release but it looks promising 🎉
